skills.description: List available Address / Pack / Filter / Active / Ignore rule classes registered in the AssetBundleCollectorSettingData. Set ruleKind=<all|addressRule|packRule|filterRule|activeRule|ignoreRule>.

skills.name: yooasset_list_independ_assets
skills.description: List IndependAssets from a BuildReport — assets not referenced by any other asset, candidates for cleanup.

skills.name: yooasset_list_report_assets
skills.description: List assets from a YooAsset BuildReport with paging and filters.

skills.name: yooasset_list_report_bundles
skills.description: List bundles from a BuildReport JSON with paging + filtering. Sort by size / name / refCount / dependCount.

skills.name: yooasset_load_build_report
skills.description: Load a BuildReport JSON file and return its Summary (build metadata + totals). Use yooasset_list_report_bundles or yooasset_get_bundle_detail for deeper dives.

skills.name: yooasset_modify_collector
skills.description: Modify an existing AssetBundleCollector matched by collectPath.

skills.name: yooasset_modify_collector_group
skills.description: Modify a collector group name, description, active rule, or tags.

skills.name: yooasset_modify_collector_package
skills.description: Modify package-level collector options: description, addressable mode, extensionless support, GUID inclusion, shader auto-collection, and ignore rule.

skills.name: yooasset_modify_collector_settings
skills.description: Modify global AssetBundleCollectorSetting flags such as package view and unique bundle names.

skills.name: yooasset_open_assetart_scanner_window
skills.description: Open the YooAsset AssetArt Scanner window.

skills.name: yooasset_open_builder_window
skills.description: Open the YooAsset 'AssetBundle Builder' Editor window (menu: YooAsset/AssetBundle Builder).

skills.name: yooasset_open_collector_window
skills.description: Open the YooAsset 'AssetBundle Collector' Editor window (menu: YooAsset/AssetBundle Collector).

skills.name: yooasset_open_debugger_window
skills.description: Open the YooAsset AssetBundle Debugger window.

skills.name: yooasset_open_reporter_window
skills.description: Open the YooAsset AssetBundle Reporter window.

skills.name: yooasset_remove_collector
skills.description: Remove an AssetBundleCollector matched by collectPath.

skills.name: yooasset_remove_collector_group
skills.description: Remove a collector group from a package.

skills.name: yooasset_remove_collector_package
skills.description: Remove a collector package by name.

skills.name: yooasset_runtime_cleanup
skills.description: Clean completed YooAsset runtime validation jobs and optionally force YooAssets cleanup / exit Play Mode.

skills.name: yooasset_runtime_get_validation_result
skills.description: Get the current status/result for a YooAsset runtime validation job.

skills.name: yooasset_runtime_validate_package
skills.description: Start a PlayMode runtime validation job for YooAsset EditorSimulateMode initialization, asset load/release, downloader status, and cleanup.

skills.name: yooasset_run_all_assetart_scanners
skills.description: Run all YooAsset AssetArtScanners, optionally filtered by keyword.

skills.name: yooasset_run_assetart_scanner

skills.name: yooasset_save_collector_config
skills.description: Persist the AssetBundleCollectorSetting ScriptableObject to disk; optionally run FixFile() first to repair dangling rule names.

skills.name: yooasset_set_build_settings

skills.name: yooasset_simulate_build
